evidenceRatingScale: 1-5 stars informed by Schoenfeld hypertrophy literature, Stronger By Science syntheses, Renaissance Periodization volume guidance, and ExRx biomechanics. 5 = top-tier compound with strong evidence. 1 = niche or weak evidence.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.cue: Tuck elbows ~45° from torso, drive feet into floor, bar to lower sternum.

exercises.name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
exercises.cue: Set bench to ~30°; bar touches upper chest; biases clavicular pec.

exercises.name: Decline Bench Press
exercises.cue: Slight decline; bar to lower chest; biases lower pec fibers.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.cue: Stretch deeper than barbell; press dumbbells together at top.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.cue: 30° bench; lower until elbows are slightly below torso line.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.cue: Sit upright; press without flaring elbows wide; controlled eccentric.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Bench Press
exercises.cue: Fixed bar path; good for high-rep work or training without a spotter.

exercises.name: Dip (Chest Bias)
exercises.cue: Lean torso forward ~30° throughout; chest stretches at the bottom.

exercises.name: Push-Up
exercises.cue: Hands under shoulders; full body line; lower chest to within an inch of floor.

exercises.name: Cable Fly
exercises.cue: Slight constant elbow bend; arc hands together at sternum height.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Fly
exercises.cue: Soft elbow bend; stretch wide, hug-a-tree at top; don't muscle with shoulders.

exercises.name: Pec Deck
exercises.cue: Forearms flat on pads; squeeze chest, not shoulders; pause at peak.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Pullover
exercises.cue: Lie across bench; arc dumbbell over and behind head; deep ribcage stretch.

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift (Conventional)
exercises.cue: Bar over mid-foot; brace hard; push the floor away, don't yank with the back.

exercises.name: Pull-Up
exercises.cue: Pull elbows down to ribs; lead with chest, not chin.

exercises.name: Chin-Up
exercises.cue: Underhand grip, shoulder width; full hang to chest-to-bar.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.cue: Pull bar to upper chest; drive elbows down, not back.

exercises.name: Barbell Row (Bent-Over)
exercises.cue: Hinge to ~45°; pull bar to lower ribs; control the lower more than the lift.

exercises.name: Pendlay Row
exercises.cue: Reset bar on floor each rep; explosive pull, dead stop, flat back.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.cue: Tall chest; pull handle to belly button; squeeze mid-back at end.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Row
exercises.cue: One knee on bench; pull dumbbell to hip, not chest; flat back throughout.

exercises.name: T-Bar Row
exercises.cue: Chest supported when possible; pull handle to lower chest.

exercises.name: Inverted Row
exercises.cue: Body in straight line; pull chest to bar; pause briefly.

exercises.name: Machine Row (Chest-Supported)
exercises.cue: Chest pad firm; lead with elbows, finish with squeeze; great for low-back days.

exercises.name: Straight-Arm Pulldown
exercises.cue: Soft elbows; arc bar to thighs; feel lats stretch and contract.

exercises.name: Barbell Overhead Press
exercises.cue: Bar starts on front delts; press straight; head through at lockout.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.cue: Seated upright; press until arms vertical; no slamming lockout.

exercises.name: Arnold Press
exercises.cue: Start palms-in at shoulder; rotate as you press up.

exercises.name: Machine Shoulder Press
exercises.cue: Adjust seat so handles are at shoulder height; press straight up.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.cue: Lead with elbows; stop at shoulder height; thumb slightly down.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.cue: Cable from low pulley; cross body; better stretch tension than dumbbell version.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.cue: Rope to nose level; pull elbows high and wide; external rotate at end.

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck
exercises.cue: Pull arms back in arc; squeeze rear delts, not mid-back.

exercises.name: Cable Reverse Fly
exercises.cue: Cross cables at chest; arc out and back; minimal trap involvement.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Front Raise
exercises.cue: Front delts already worked by pressing; use sparingly as a finisher.

exercises.name: Barbell Curl
exercises.cue: Elbows pinned to sides; control the lower more than the lift.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Curl
exercises.cue: Supinate as you curl; full ROM at the bottom; alternating or together.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.cue: Neutral grip; curl across body to opposite shoulder for peak contraction.

exercises.name: Preacher Curl
exercises.cue: Pad in armpit; don't fully extend at the bottom, protect the elbow.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
exercises.cue: Bench at ~60°; let arms hang behind torso for stretched-position bias.

exercises.name: Cable Curl
exercises.cue: Constant tension throughout; pause and squeeze at the peak.

exercises.name: Concentration Curl
exercises.cue: Elbow against inner thigh; isolate; squeeze hard at top.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.cue: Hands shoulder-width; tuck elbows; bar to lower sternum.

exercises.name: Cable Tricep Pushdown
exercises.cue: Elbows pinned at ribs; full lockout; rope or straight bar both work.

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Extension (Cable)
exercises.cue: Arms by ears at top; deep stretch — long head responds best to overhead.

exercises.name: Skull Crusher (EZ-Bar)
exercises.cue: EZ-bar; lower to forehead or just behind head; keep elbows in.

exercises.name: Dip (Tricep Bias)
exercises.cue: Stay vertical to bias triceps over chest; controlled descent.

exercises.name: JM Press
exercises.cue: Hybrid skull-crusher and close-grip; tuck elbows, lower to throat.

exercises.name: Tricep Kickback
exercises.cue: Elbow high and pinned; extend, squeeze, control return.

exercises.name: Bench Dip
exercises.cue: Hands on bench behind; keep feet close to limit shoulder strain.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.cue: Bar on traps; brace; hips and knees move together; depth at parallel or below.

exercises.name: Front Squat
exercises.cue: Bar on front delts; elbows high; upright torso biases quads.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.cue: Feet shoulder-width on platform; full ROM; never hard-lock the knees.

exercises.name: Hack Squat (Machine)
exercises.cue: Feet lower on platform for quad bias; sit deep, drive through whole foot.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.cue: Rear foot elevated; drop straight down; front leg does the work.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.cue: Long step; back knee taps the floor; push off the front heel.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.cue: Seat aligned with knee axis; pause and squeeze at the top.

exercises.name: Step-Up
exercises.cue: Knee-height bench; drive through whole foot; no rebound off rear leg.

exercises.name: Sissy Squat
exercises.cue: Knees travel forward; lean back as you sink; quad isolator, hard on knees.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.cue: Soft knees; push hips back; bar drags down thighs; stop at upper shins.

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.cue: Pad above heels; curl, squeeze, control eccentric.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.cue: Hamstring stretch is greater seated; full ROM beats heavy partials.

exercises.name: Nordic Curl
exercises.cue: Anchor ankles; lower body slowly; eccentric powerhouse for the hamstrings.

exercises.name: Glute-Ham Raise
exercises.cue: Hip hinge into knee flexion; trains both hamstring functions.

exercises.name: Good Morning
exercises.cue: Bar on traps; hinge with neutral spine; light loads, big stretch.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Romanian Deadlift
exercises.cue: One leg back; hinge with flat back; balance is the limiter, not load.

exercises.name: Stiff-Leg Deadlift
exercises.cue: Minimal knee bend; deeper than RDL; bar can lightly touch the floor.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.cue: Shoulders on bench; bar over hips with pad; full lockout, ribs down.

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
exercises.cue: Floor version of hip thrust; bridge to full lockout, pause at top.

exercises.name: Cable Pull-Through
exercises.cue: Cable between legs; hinge back, lock out hips with glutes.

exercises.name: Cable Glute Kickback
exercises.cue: Ankle strap; kick straight back, squeeze; don't arch the low back.

exercises.name: Sumo Deadlift
exercises.cue: Wide stance, hands inside; vertical torso; drive knees out hard.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge
exercises.cue: Step back; drop into lunge; less knee stress than walking lunges.

exercises.name: Hip Abduction (Machine)
exercises.cue: Lean slightly forward to bias glute med; pause at full abduction.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.cue: Full stretch at bottom; pause at top; no bouncing.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.cue: Knees bent isolates the soleus; slow tempo, deep stretch.

exercises.name: Leg Press Calf Raise
exercises.cue: Balls of feet on platform edge; full ROM; safer than freestanding loaded.

exercises.name: Donkey Calf Raise
exercises.cue: Hinge forward; partner or band on hips; strong stretch position.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Calf Raise
exercises.cue: One leg, full stretch; great for unilateral imbalance work.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.cue: Dead hang; raise straight legs to parallel or higher; no swing.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.cue: Kneel; rope behind head; crunch by rounding spine, hips don't move.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel Rollout
exercises.cue: Roll out as far as you can hold neutral spine; pull yourself back.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.cue: Straight line head to heels; squeeze glutes; quality > duration.

exercises.name: Pallof Press
exercises.cue: Cable at chest height; press out, resist rotation; underrated anti-rotation.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.cue: Low back pressed to floor; opposite arm and leg extend slowly.

exercises.name: Weighted Sit-Up
exercises.cue: Hold plate at chest; full sit-up; protect the neck.

exercises.name: Hollow Body Hold
exercises.cue: Lower back glued to floor; arms and legs off ground; gymnastic staple.

exercises.name: Barbell Wrist Curl
exercises.cue: Forearms on bench, wrists hanging off; curl bar with the wrist only.

exercises.name: Barbell Reverse Wrist Curl
exercises.cue: Same setup, palms down; lighter load, longer ROM, hits extensors.

exercises.name: EZ-Bar Reverse Curl
exercises.cue: Overhand grip on EZ-bar; curl as normal; hammers the brachioradialis.

exercises.name: Farmer's Carry
exercises.cue: Heavy dumbbells; walk tall; grip and core trainer in one.

exercises.name: Dead Hang
exercises.cue: Hang from bar; full body relaxed except grip; build hang time.

exercises.name: Plate Pinch
exercises.cue: Pinch two plates smooth-side-out; hold for time.

exercises.name: Barbell Shrug
exercises.cue: Heavy bar (use straps); shrug straight up; no rolls.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shrug
exercises.cue: Dumbbells at sides; shrug high, hold a count, control down.

exercises.name: Rack Pull
exercises.cue: Bar set just below knees; partial deadlift overload for upper back.

exercises.name: Snatch-Grip High Pull
exercises.cue: Wide grip; explosive hip drive; bar to upper chest, elbows high.

exercises.name: Cable Shrug
exercises.cue: Cable from below; shrug up and slightly back; constant tension.
